ha.qualityTooltip: Ingancin matsawa daga 1-100. Mafi girman inganci yana nufin ƙarancin matsawa da manyan fayiloli.
ha.effortTooltip:
Matsayin ƙoƙarin CPU don rage girman fayil daga 0-6 don webp da 1-10 don png.
Ƙoƙari mafi girma yana nufin sarrafa hoto zai ɗauki lokaci mai tsawo amma yawanci zai fi kyau kallo kuma girman fayil ya ragu.
ha.revealFolder: Bayyana babban fayil a cikin mai sarrafa fayil
ha.revealImage: Bayyana hoto a cikin mai sarrafa fayil
ha.themeTooltip: Jigon nuni na ƙa'idar. Matsaloli ta atomatik zuwa zaɓin tsarin ku.
ha.clickDragChange: Danna ka ja don canza ƙima
ha.maxWidthTooltip: Matsakaicin faɗin don daidaita girman hoton fitarwa. Shigar da 0 don babu girman matsi akan wannan gatari.
ha.maxHeightTooltip: Matsakaicin tsayi don daidaita girman hoton fitarwa. Shigar da 0 don babu girman matsi akan wannan gatari.
ha.outputFolderTooltip: Ta tsohuwa ana amfani da babban fayil ɗin Hotunan mai amfani don tushen abubuwan fitarwa. Hakanan kuna iya saita jagorar al'ada.
ha.languageTooltip: Harshen da aka rubuta da aka yi amfani da shi a ko'ina cikin app.
ha.formatTooltip:
Tsarin fayil ɗin fitarwa. WebP tsoho ne kuma yawanci yana ba da mafi kyawun matsawa fiye da sauran zaɓuɓɓuka.
Hakanan yana da tallafin mai fa'ida mai fa'ida kuma yana ba da goyan baya ga tsarin raye-raye kamar gif.
jpeg da png suna samuwa kuma idan buƙatar ta taso.
ha.isAlreadyInList: ya riga ya kasance a cikin jerin
ha.fileTypeOneOf: Nau'in fayil dole ne ya zama ɗaya daga cikin
ha.imagesMissing: Hoto (s) ya ɓace daga tsarin fayil.
ha.deleteImagesSuccess: An goge duk hotuna cikin nasara
ha.unknownError: Kuskuren da ba a sani ba ya faru.
ha.confirmClearAllMessage: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share duk hotuna?
ha.confirmClearAllDetail: Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba.
ha.confirmDeleteImageMessage: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share wannan fayil ɗin?
ha.confirmDeleteImageDetail: Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba.
ha.madeWith: An yi shi da 💜 a Oakland, CA.
ha.settingsWriteError: Ba a iya rubuta fayil ɗin saituna ba.
